title: New Eva Latin American DUB
wikitext:
[]: New Eva (Latin American) DUB!             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Mon May 19, 2008 8:51 am Animax in Latin America has premiered Neon Genesis Evang(geh)lion in the *NEW* Latin DUB. Where the first one made in Venezuela witch had perfect voices(Asuka spoke with a German Accent) and the only error I recall was Kaji calling the AT Field an Anti tank field in one episode(lol). Now the just premiered this new dub....I saw episode 1 and 2, and my ears bled. The Voices have changed RADICALLY. This Evangelion was translated in Mexico, Misato's Voice is Younger, Ritsuko's Voice is Younger, Gendo has the same voice, Fuyutski speaks like a 30 year old, Rei sound like a woman, Shinji sound like he had his balls cut off, OH! And the best part, the CHANGED NAMES OF THINGS!!!! Eva= Aiva(Like how you say A-hole) Capsules= Cartridge (Blow me! NES joke) AT Field= Atomic Field (ran out of things to write here) zOMFGWTFJEEBUS!!!!1!one! I REALLY dont want to see anymore episodes, but as a fan of the series I must sit and watch/hear how they butcher my religion. What's next? Asuka with a Kykyo's voice from inuyasha?(actually yes, the mexican voice actress for Kykyo is gonna do Asuka) Reriel? Switching Adam for Gabriel? Lilith for Eve? heck the should change SEELE for Di$ney FUCK! ~ Rant of The Angry Evangelion Nerd plz post cmmnts of your thoughts

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Mon May 19, 2008 9:43 am thats me punching the dub team

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Mon May 19, 2008 9:45 am Seriously , Im gonna find out the names of the DUB team and go to my local Haitian Witch Doctor, ta' see what curses he can give them.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Tue May 20, 2008 3:04 am Lol and to think its taken what? 10 years to do it lol. Hay hears an Idea lets do our own EGF Dub lmao

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue May 20, 2008 3:41 am Hmm...this looks interesting but the dub could be all messed up and sounding silly.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Tue May 20, 2008 7:04 am I always thought that we should make a "parody" series, say we take each episode and insert jokes. Lets say it would be a 26 episode Redeath. Recently I thought it'd be cooler if every one from EGF were to do it, Since this forum has spawn MOST of the jokes related to Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Wed May 21, 2008 5:28 am Im already a step ahead of you. Wait till ReTake I have added heeps of stuff like that into the special features section.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Wed May 21, 2008 8:07 am Be Quick! I start the Apocalypse in 2012, November 12 at 11:30AM Eastern Time! 3 years later God will send his angels to defeat me, but we ALL know the outcome of that.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Wed May 21, 2008 8:10 am Umm nope I dont your a mith same with the old man. Maby the rest of the world you know how it ends. The world has finaly blown its self up and everybodys dead but Australias like WTF?

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Wed May 21, 2008 8:15 am PLease Tell me. Have they ever made a comedy movie/series/show about that? you know, the world killing itself and australians being WTF happend? If so, I would like to see such a thing, it MUST be hilarious! Torturing for millions of years has gotten boring.

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Wed May 21, 2008 8:16 am Zeak wrote: Umm nope I dont your a mith same with the old man. Maby the rest of the world you know how it ends.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed May 21, 2008 8:18 am majlund wrote: Zeak wrote: Umm nope I dont your a mith same with the old man. Maby the rest of the world you know how it ends.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Wed May 21, 2008 8:19 am No need for english here is your film. http://www.albinoblacksheep.com/flash/end

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Wed May 21, 2008 8:24 am You mean my greatest magic trick! I convinced the world I dont exist! Let's see if Criss Angel, or David Blaine pull that off! Dont worry Zeak, your soul is useless to me, Only religeous Zealots are fun to tortue. The greatest Pleasure in my immortality is to se how the fall.

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Wed May 21, 2008 8:26 am Zeak wrote: Umm nope I dont your a mith same with the old man. Maby the rest of the world you know how it ends.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Wed May 21, 2008 8:27 am Lol put it this way. I spent a year with cerberus and I enjoyed it. If that was ment to be the guard to the gates of hell then hell must be one hell of a fun place. @ everybody who didnt get it. Nope not a code A large %age of Australians are non religious. About the same %age again are but are not serious about it and dont realy care. Thats almost half the countries population (About 10 million).

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Wed May 21, 2008 8:30 am Zeak wrote: http://www.albinoblacksheep.com/flash/end

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Wed May 21, 2008 8:31 am OFCOURSE GOD IS REAL! Ever Heard of Brik Haus!? If He's Real that Mean Im real! Who did you think is typing this Bull? Some poor bastard in a third world country, who got divorced, lost guardianship of his child, and his ex wife is cheating on her current boyfriend with him?

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Wed May 21, 2008 8:35 am majlund wrote: Anyway: Topic - Gentlemen?

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Wed May 21, 2008 8:36 am BOT I may also add that in the spanish DUB Asukas name is apparently ELENA for some reason.
